title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Oberoi Realty

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Oberoi Realty
jsonLd.description:
We at Oberoi Realty are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Oberoi Realty:
Oberoi Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty!
